studies.title: Effect of individual motivation and information for the recovery of stroke patients

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the Rehappy digital therapeutic product, as evidenced by the trial description and intervention details that explicitly mention the use of the Rehappy app for stroke aftercare.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a randomized controlled trial (RCT) where stroke patients are randomly allocated to either use the Rehappy app or be in a control group, which is a defining feature of an RCT.
